message:
fix(workflows): mark trigger event handled when step requires approval

When a workflow step returns requires_approval, the trigger event is
now marked as handled with status "requires_approval". Previously,
approval-gated trigger events could remain in "unhandled" state
indefinitely, causing them to be re-evaluated on subsequent ticks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
